word: G4994 - σωφρονίζω - sōphronízō - so-fron-id'-zo - Teach to be sober

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Teach to be sober
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
restore one to his senses; to moderate, control, curb, discipline; to hold one to his duty
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4998; to make of sound mind, that is, (figuratively) to discipline or correct: - teach to be sober.
